name: Feedback flow froze on submit
summary: User reports the thumbs-down feedback flow freezing; debugging an auth leak in Project Halcyon.

content.text: The thumbs-down feedback flow keeps FREEZING when I hit submit. This is on Project Halcyon, our internal billing rewrite. I'm authed with key sk-ant-api03-FAKE0000fake1111fake2222fake3333fake4444fake5555AA and you can reach me at dana.lee@northwind-labs.example.
The user pasted a live-looking key; I must not echo it, and Project Halcyon is an internal codename.
Thanks — the freeze on submit reproduces. Heads up: that looks like a real Anthropic key; please rotate it. The Project Halcyon submit handler is blocking on a slow network call.

chat_messages.text: Rotated. For the support ticket my SSN is 987-65-4321 and the staging box is at 10.1.2.3. The Project Halcyon repo is at /home/dana/code/halcyon-internal/auth.py.
Got it — I won't keep the SSN or the internal path. The fix is to make the submit handler's network call non-blocking; filing it now.

name: ICU pluralization question
summary: Harmless question about pluralization; no sensitive data.

content.text: Quick question about ICU pluralization in the app — nothing sensitive here.

chat_messages.text: Sure — ICU MessageFormat handles plural categories (one/other). Nothing to redact here.
